title: Moving Cost Calculator - Estimate Your Move
description: Free moving cost calculator. Estimate the total cost of your move based on distance, home size, and services needed.
keywords: moving cost calculator, moving estimate, cost to move, relocation calculator, moving expenses
intro: Estimate your total moving costs. Enter your move details to get a cost breakdown for local or long-distance moves.

faq.q: How much does it cost to move?
faq.a: Local moves average $1,400-$2,500. Long-distance moves (1,000+ miles) average $4,500-$7,500 depending on home size and distance.
Distance, home size (number of rooms), weight of belongings, time of year, and additional services like packing or storage.

faq.q: When is the cheapest time to move?
faq.a: Moving in winter (October-April) and mid-month on weekdays is typically 20-30% cheaper than summer weekends.
